description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a gently curved front and ornate, cabriole-style legs. The top surface is made of dark, textured wood, contrasting with the lighter, painted body of the piece. Three spacious drawers are present, each adorned with decorative handles and subtle carved embellishments. The front panel showcases elegant detailing, including scalloped lower trim and raised drawer fronts. The sides are plain with recessed panels, while the back is constructed from a flat, wood-paneled surface. This piece combines both decorative and functional elements, making it suitable for stylish storage in urban interiors or sheltered outdoor settings.
description: A vintage-style chest of drawers with a dark wood top, light painted body, ornate legs, and three decorative drawers. Features elegant carved details and classic handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing three curved drawers with ornate handles, scalloped trim, and decorative legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, recessed panel and the dark wood top's edge.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, wood-paneled back with no decorative features or handles.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain panel and the profile of the curved front.
